subcodes.first_line: The verses have been sent down as the signs appeared, and the Spirit speaketh amidst the world and beareth glad-tidings unto all peoples through the Name [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد نزلت الایات اذ ظهرت العلامات و الروح ینطق بین العالم و یبشر الامم بالاسم
subcodes.subjects: @knowledge; recognition of God, @Greatest Name, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Crimson Ark; the Ark of God, @humility; meekness; lowliness
